```curt
s = "aaabbcccca"
result = ""
i = 0
while i < s.len {
  ch = s[i]
  count = 1
  while i + count < s.len and s[i + count] == ch { count += 1 }
  result += ch + count.str
  i += count
}
print result
```

```curt
a = 252
b = 105

while b != 0 {
  t = b
  b = a % b
  a = t
}

print a
```

```curt
items = [("widget", 4, 2.5), ("gizmo", 2, 7.25), ("bolt", 10, 0.1)]
totals = items | map (name, qty, price) -> (name, qty * price)
grand = totals | map t -> t.1 | sum
best = totals | top 1 t -> t.1 | first
print grand
print best.0
```

```curt
items = [("widget", 4, 2.5), ("gizmo", 2, 7.25), ("bolt", 10, 0.1)]
totals = items | map t -> (t.0, t.1 * t.2)
grand = totals | map t -> t.1 | sum
best = totals | top 1 t -> t.1 | first
print grand
print best.0
```

```curt
sentence = "the cat sat on the mat with the cat"
counts = sentence.words.counts.pairs | top 2 .v
for p in counts { print "{p.k} {p.v}" }
```

```curt
s = "a=1,b=22,c=333"
total = 0
for pair in s.split "," {
  parts = pair.split "="
  val = parts[1].int
  total += val
}
print total
```

```curt
celsius = [12.5, 30.0, -5.0]
fahrenheit = celsius | map c -> c * 9 / 5 + 32
print (fahrenheit.max)
```

```curt
describe v = match v {
  int n -> "int {n+1}",
  float f -> "float {f}",
  str s -> "str {s.len}"
}

print (describe 42)
print (describe 3.5)
print (describe "abc")
```

```curt
sentence = "pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs"
words = sentence.words
longest = words | top 1 .len | map .0 | first
avg_len = words | map .len | fold 0 acc n -> acc + n / words.len.float
print longest
print avg_len.int
```

```curt

valid = ages | keep a -> a >= 0 and a <= 120
print valid.len
print (ages.len - valid.len)
print (valid | sum)
```

```curt
cfg = (fs.read "app.cfg").json ? {}
port = cfg["port"] ? 8080
name = cfg["name"] ? "app"
debug = cfg["debug"] ? false
host = cfg["host"] ? "localhost"
mode = if debug { "debug" } else { "prod" }
print "{mode} {host}:{port}"
```

```curt
orders = json (fs.read "orders.json")
paid_total = orders | keep o -> o["status"] == "paid" | map o -> o["amt"] | sum
open_count = orders | keep o -> o["status"] == "open" | len
print paid_total
print open_count
```

```curt
orders = (fs.read "orders.json").json
print (orders | keep o -> o["amt"] > 25 | sort desc o -> o["amt"] | map o -> o["id"] | join ",")
```

```curt
cfg = json (fs.read "app.cfg" ? "{}")
name = cfg["name"] ? "unknown"
orders = json (fs.read "orders.json" ? "[]")
paid = orders | keep o -> o["paid"]
count = paid.len
total = paid | map o -> o["amt"] | sum
print "{name}: {count} paid, total {total}"
```
